summary: All five SC-W6 defeating conditions were attacked under the frozen rules. No assessable case established a sixth universal primitive, no faithful uniform effective RCCD escape survived full machinery charging, neutral formulations defeated the circularity challenge, no independently faithful non-reconstructible plural kernel was found, and every R1-R5 ablation either lost a P* distinction or reintroduced the component through charged machinery.

condition_results.qualification: phenomenological or tacit salience remains evidentially unresolved and is not counted as RCCD support
the search is broad and adversarial but not logically exhaustive over every possible representation
neutral class and contract formulations remain contestable philosophical choices but do not presuppose R1-R5 syntactically or operationally
realization plurality and Pareto incomparability remain; kernel plurality was not established
necessity remains relative to C*, P* and E*

decisive_witnesses: identical conclusions with selectively defeated different grounds require R3
identical current commitments with different supersession paths require R4
identical external behavior with different semantic and dependency commitments defeats behavior-only quotients
extensional tables and proof transformers recover faithfulness only through charged RCCD-equivalent annotations and interfaces
case-specific recovery oracles implement rather than eliminate R5
impact_on_starting_result: The SC-W6 result survives this registered internal adversarial campaign. The result is strengthened only against the five tested defeating routes; it is not converted into unrestricted universality.
remaining_limits: non-exhaustiveness over every possible ontology and representation
